title: message_get and contact_get: no limit on caller-supplied ids array — unbounded DB queries
description: daemon/src/store.rs get_messages (line 1703) and get_contacts issue one SQLite query per ID with no upper bound on array length. daemon/src/jmap.rs message_get (line 1771) and contact_get (line 428) pass the full client-supplied ids array to store with no cap. A client sending 100,000 IDs causes 100,000 sequential SQLite reads, exhausting the connection pool. Fix: cap ids.len() at 4096 in the JMAP handlers and return invalidArguments if exceeded.
